_comment: Add these hooks to your ~/.claude/settings.json to auto-trigger save-project-assets

hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"[save-project-assets active] Run /save-project-assets (or /save-project-assets-zh / -en) proactthunder: before commits, after fixes, on user request (save/record/保存/记录/update docs)." }}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"[save-project-assets] Session ending — if new lessons, confirmed fixes, or ideas were produced this session, consider running /save-project-assets before closing."}}'
